channel.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories
channel.description: Top stories in the U.S. and world news, politics, health, science, business, music, arts and culture. Nonprofit journalism with a mission. This is NPR.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

image.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories

item.title: South Carolina's measles outbreak is over. But more are brewing around the country
item.description: The virus infected nearly 1,000 people in the state before the state declared it over. Meanwhile, cases are spreading across many parts of the U.S., with more than 20 outbreaks currently active.
item.content:encoded:
The virus infected nearly 1,000 people in the state before the state declared it over. Meanwhile, cases are spreading across many parts of the U.S., with more than 20 outbreaks currently active.

(Image credit: The Washington Post)
item.dc:creator: Maria Godoy

item.title: Supreme Court heard case on how to label risks of popular weed killer
item.description: How the Supreme Court rules could have implications for tens of thousands of lawsuits against Roundup maker Monsanto, which is now owned by Bayer.
item.content:encoded:
How the Supreme Court rules could have implications for tens of thousands of lawsuits against Roundup maker Monsanto, which is now owned by Bayer.

(Image credit: Jean-Francois Monier)
item.dc:creator: Carrie Johnson

item.title: Here's a look inside security at the White House Correspondents' Association Dinner
item.description: Saturday's shooting at the White House Correspondents' Association Dinner raised questions about how close the alleged gunman got to the president and what the Secret Service security looked like.
item.content:encoded:
Saturday's shooting at the White House Correspondents' Association Dinner raised questions about how close the alleged gunman got to the president and what the Secret Service security looked like.

(Image credit: Alex Brandon)
item.dc:creator: Tamara Keith

item.title: Melania Trump wants ABC to 'take a stand' against Jimmy Kimmel after 'hateful' joke
item.description: Two days before the White House Correspondents' Dinner ended in gunfire, Kimmel delivered a mock Correspondents' Dinner speech during a sketch on his show. The first lady said it was "corrosive."
item.content:encoded:
Two days before the White House Correspondents' Dinner ended in gunfire, Kimmel delivered a mock Correspondents' Dinner speech during a sketch on his show. The first lady said it was "corrosive."

(Image credit: Mandel Ngan)
item.dc:creator: Mandalit del Barco

item.title: Young pop stars are burning out — and singing through it
item.description: On jagged new albums and festival stages, rising pop artists are learning there may be no escape from the influencer economy.
item.content:encoded:
On jagged new albums and festival stages, rising pop artists are learning there may be no escape from the influencer economy.

(Image credit: Ally Wei)
item.dc:creator: Sheldon Pearce

item.title: 'I love transforming': Nick Offerman goes from Pawnee to pro wrestler
item.description: Best known for his role as Ron Swanson on Parks and Recreation, Offerman plays a former professional wrestler reconnecting with his estranged daughter in Margo's Got Money Troubles.
item.content:encoded:
'/>

Best known for his role as Ron Swanson on Parks and Recreation, Offerman plays a former professional wrestler reconnecting with his estranged daughter in Margo's Got Money Troubles.
item.dc:creator: Ann Marie Baldonado

item.title: An off-beat family makes some 'Big Mistakes' in this clever crime farce
item.description: A new Netflix comedy series by and starring Dan Levy is a wild inversion of Schitt's Creek. Where that show started out cartoonish and grew warmer, Big Mistakes is a frolic that grows more hellish.
item.content:encoded:
A new Netflix comedy series by and starring Dan Levy is a wild inversion of Schitt's Creek. Where that show started out cartoonish and grew warmer, Big Mistakes is a frolic that grows more hellish.

(Image credit: Spencer Pazer)
item.dc:creator: John Powers

item.title: Florida's DeSantis unveils a voting map that could add to Trump's GOP redistricting
item.description: Florida's governor has called lawmakers to meet starting Tuesday. They'll consider a fast-track redistricting that could flip some House seats held by Democrats to Republicans.
item.content:encoded:
Florida's governor has called lawmakers to meet starting Tuesday. They'll consider a fast-track redistricting that could flip some House seats held by Democrats to Republicans.

(Image credit: Julia Demaree Nikhinson)
item.dc:creator: Douglas Soule

item.title: China blocks Meta from acquiring AI startup Manus
item.description: Meta said Monday that the transaction "complied fully with applicable law" and that it anticipates "an appropriate resolution to the inquiry."
item.content:encoded:
Meta said Monday that the transaction "complied fully with applicable law" and that it anticipates "an appropriate resolution to the inquiry."

(Image credit: Jeff Chiu/AP)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Iran's flurry of diplomacy continues in Russia, as Trump reviews Iran's latest proposal
item.description: Iran's foreign minister arrived in Russia on Monday, after a whirlwind weekend of diplomacy, seeking to gain political leverage and foreign backing as peace talks with the U.S. remain on hold.
item.content:encoded:
Iran's foreign minister arrived in Russia on Monday, after a whirlwind weekend of diplomacy, seeking to gain political leverage and foreign backing as peace talks with the U.S. remain on hold.

(Image credit: Dmitry Lovetsky)
item.dc:creator: NPR Staff
